story.iWant: to describe my presentation purpose and audience
story.soThat: the system can propose an appropriate narrative structure for a complete slide deck

task.name: Create Plan-Deck Workflow Structure
task.subtask: 1.1: Create .slide-builder/workflows/plan-deck/ directory
1.2: Create workflow.yaml with configuration
1.3: Create instructions.md with Phase 1: Prerequisites and Input Collection
1.4: Implement theme.json prerequisite check with clear error message
task.note: Directory and basic workflow files already exist - need to enhance instructions

task.name: Implement Deck Plan Initiator Module
task.subtask: 2.1: Implement presentation purpose prompt
2.2: Implement target audience prompt with example suggestions
2.3: Implement key points prompt (accepts bullet list)
2.4: Implement optional desired length prompt (default 6-10)
2.5: Store collected inputs for Narrative Generator
2.6: Handle error case: no theme exists

task.name: Implement Narrative Generator Module
task.subtask: 3.1: Analyze user inputs to determine storyline arc
3.2: Generate storyline structure (opening_hook, tension, resolution, call_to_action)
3.3: Generate slide breakdown (6-10 slides) with number, intent, template, storyline_role
3.4: Display proposed narrative to user for review

task.name: Implement Plan Modifier Module
task.subtask: 4.1: Display slide-by-slide breakdown in readable format
4.2: Prompt: "Make changes or type 'done' to finalize"
4.3: Parse modification commands (add, remove, reorder, modify)
4.4: Renumber slides after structural changes
4.5: Redisplay plan after each modification
4.6: Loop until user confirms "done"

task.name: Implement Mode Switcher and Persister
task.subtask: 5.1: Write plan.yaml to .slide-builder/deck/ with full schema
5.2: Create deck/slides/ directory if needed
5.3: Update status.yaml with mode: deck, total_slides, built_count
5.4: Add to history array with timestamp
5.5: Display success message with next steps

task.name: Register /sb:plan-deck Slash Command
task.subtask: 6.1: Create .claude/commands/sb/plan-deck.md with usage documentation
6.2: Reference plan-deck workflow from command file
6.3: Document command options
task.note: File already exists - verify it correctly invokes the workflow

task.name: Testing - Full Workflow Verification
task.subtask: 7.1: Test with theme present - verify all prompts appear
7.2: Test default slide count applied when skipped
7.3: Test narrative structure has all storyline elements
7.4: Test slide breakdown has required fields
7.5: Test plan.yaml created with correct schema
7.6: Test status.yaml updated correctly
7.7: Test error case: no theme.json
7.8: Run Frontend Test Gate checklist

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Given a theme exists, when the user runs /plan-deck, then they are prompted for presentation purpose
The user is prompted for target audience (e.g., "Technical decision makers")
The user is prompted for key points to convey (bullet list)
The user can optionally specify desired length (defaults to 6-10 slides)
After collecting inputs, the system proposes a narrative structure with slide-by-slide breakdown
Each slide in the proposal shows: number, title/purpose, key content description, suggested template
The deck plan is saved to .slide-builder/deck/plan.yaml
status.yaml is updated with mode: "deck" and total_slides count
Given no theme exists, when user runs /plan-deck, then error message directs them to run /setup first

doc.title: Epic 5 Technical Specification
doc.section: Services and Modules, Data Models and Contracts, Workflows and Sequencing
doc.snippet: Defines Deck Plan Initiator, Narrative Generator, and Mode Switcher modules. Contains complete plan.yaml schema with rich per-slide context. Details /plan-deck workflow phases.

doc.title: Slide Builder Architecture
doc.section: Novel Pattern 2 (Template-or-Custom), Novel Pattern 4 (Dual-Mode State), State File Patterns
doc.snippet: Intent-to-template mapping pattern. Mode detection via status.yaml. Complete plan.yaml schema with storyline, audience context, and per-slide rich context.

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: User story and acceptance criteria context for deck planning initiation workflow.

file.reason: EXISTING: Basic workflow configuration. Needs to be enhanced with all required variables.
EXISTING: Basic workflow with 5 steps. Needs enhancement for sequential prompts (AC5.1.1-4), narrative generation (AC5.1.5-6), plan.yaml schema (AC5.1.7), status.yaml updates (AC5.1.8).
EXISTING: Slash command registration. Verify it correctly invokes the workflow.
READ/MODIFY: Current status shows mode: single. Story must update to mode: deck with deck-specific tracking fields.
PREREQUISITE: Must exist before /plan-deck can run. Contains Amperity brand primitives.
REFERENCE: Example template structure for template matching in narrative generator.

dependencies.note: Epic 5 does not require npm dependencies. All operations use Claude Code built-in capabilities.

constraints.constraint: Deck mode MUST use .slide-builder/deck/ directory exclusively
plan.yaml MUST follow the documented schema with rich per-slide context
Mode MUST be set to "deck" in status.yaml when deck planning starts
Template selection MUST follow the intent-to-template mapping pattern
Story-first Planning: Captures narrative, not layout details

interface.name: plan.yaml schema
interface.signature: deck_name: string created: ISO-date last_modified: ISO-timestamp audience: string audience_knowledge_level: beginner | intermediate | expert audience_priorities: string[] purpose: string desired_outcome: string key_message: string storyline: opening_hook: string tension: string resolution: string call_to_action: string recurring_themes: string[] slides: - number: int intent: string template: string status: pending | built | failed storyline_role: opening | tension | evidence | resolution | cta key_points: string[] visual_guidance: string tone: professional | bold | warm | technical | urgent

interface.name: status.yaml deck fields
interface.signature: mode: deck | single | null current_slide: int total_slides: int built_count: int last_action: string last_modified: ISO-timestamp history: { action: string, timestamp: ISO-timestamp }[]

interface.name: Template Matching
interface.signature: Intent Keywords → Template Mapping: ├── "title", "intro", "opening" → layout-title ├── "list", "bullets", "points" → layout-list ├── "flow", "process", "timeline", "steps" → layout-flow ├── "compare", "vs", "two" → layout-columns-2 ├── "three", "triad", "options" → layout-columns-3 ├── "key", "insight", "callout", "cta" → layout-callout └── "code", "technical", "api" → layout-code

tests.standards: Per Tech Spec Test Strategy: Manual verification per AC table. Integration testing via end-to-end workflow execution. All tests performed through Claude Code CLI interactions.

ideas.idea: Run /plan-deck with theme present, verify purpose prompt appears first
After purpose, verify audience prompt appears with example suggestions
After audience, verify key points prompt appears and accepts bullet list
Skip length prompt, verify default 6-10 slides applied
Provide full inputs, verify narrative structure with storyline elements proposed
Verify each slide shows number, intent, template assignment, storyline_role
Confirm plan, verify .slide-builder/deck/plan.yaml created with correct schema
Verify status.yaml updated: mode=deck, total_slides set, built_count=0
Delete theme.json, run /plan-deck, verify clear error directing to /setup
Very long deck (15+ slides): Allow but recommend 10-12
Existing deck plan: Prompt "continue or new?"
Empty key points: Proceed with minimal narrative
